purpose: PM-owned backlog for Mojo MAPS work, including skill contracts, training surfaces, role-to-agent proof work, and engineer handoffs.
rules: Matt owns intake, sequencing, acceptance criteria, blocker tracking, evidence review, and Pipeline updates.
Using an existing MAPS skill does not require a backlog update.

Building, changing, or publishing a MAPS skill, template, validator, role/agent operating contract, proof build, Obsidian-to-Mojo training change, or /maps website update must be listed in this backlog.
Engineering implementation should be routed to Bea when the work is build/code execution rather than PM sequencing.
Liz reads Pipeline for MAPS backlog-to-website coordination only; her website work still follows Obsidian/mapstraining.md routing and Release Management for Git/GitHub writes.
Each task should define proof before implementation starts.
Git/GitHub writes, branch changes, PRs, releases, promotions, and cleanup route through Release Management before acting.
Production deployment, external communication, spending, secrets changes, self-assigned authority expansion, and autonomous runtime remain approval-gated.

tasks.title: Create Mojo MAPS backlog.json
tasks.description: Create a MAPS-specific backlog file in the Mojo repository so Matt owns a concrete PM backlog separate from the general Mojo docs backlog.

proofUnits.title: MAPS backlog exists
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: C:\Users\scott\Code\mojo\maps\backlog.json exists and contains a top-level tasks array.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Path check returns True and JSON parser exits 0.
proofUnits.verification_method: Test-Path returned True; python -m json.tool maps/backlog.json exited 0.

tasks.title: Define Matt-to-Bea engineering handoff rhythm
tasks.description: Define how Matt routes implementation slices to Bea: scope, source files, acceptance criteria, proof units, authority boundaries, owner, due status, blocker handling, and Pipeline update cadence.
tasks.source: Scott direction that Bea is the MAPS engineer and Matt should take PM role

proofUnits.title: Handoff format documented
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Matt has a repeatable handoff format for Bea with scope, files, acceptance criteria, proof, risks, and authority boundaries.
proofUnits.exactCommand: Review maps/backlog.json and Matt workflow/memory for Bea handoff format.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Backlog or Matt workflow includes the handoff fields and routing rule.
proofUnits.verification_method: Targeted rg confirmed /role v0.23.0 and topic labels in installed and Mojo repo role skill/template files; live matt-handoff-check readback confirmed topic-paragraph prompt formatting.

tasks.title: Run real role-to-agent proof build for /build-agent v0.4.0
tasks.description: Use the new /build-agent v0.4.0 contract on a real role-to-agent build and collect proof for runnable command evidence, missing profile/design fail-closed tests, stricter-profile conflict tests, profile-denied behavior tests, audit/state/log artifacts, runtime-adapter decision, and Equip/Evaluate handoffs.

proofUnits.title: Build contract proof run exists
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: At least one real role-to-agent build satisfies /build-agent v0.4.0 proof requirements before Build is called 10/10 mature.
proofUnits.exactCommand: Run selected local build command and tests from the chosen role-to-agent proof build.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Command evidence, tests, audit/state/log artifacts, adapter decision, and Equip/Evaluate handoffs are recorded.
proofUnits.verification_method: python -m json.tool maps/backlog.json exited 0; python assets/maps/scripts/validate_maps_skills.py passed for 21 skills.

tasks.title: Mirror shared MAPS skill changes to MAPS+Org when approved
tasks.description: Determine counterpart status for shared MAPS role/agent operating-system changes and route any Mojo / MAPS+Org source sync through Release Management before Git/GitHub writes.
tasks.blocker: Current request scoped to Mojo MAPS backlog only; do not inspect MAPS+Org without explicit approval or a routed release-management item.

proofUnits.title: Release routing exists before repo sync
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Any proposed Git/GitHub write identifies repo, branch, action, risk, approval state, and counterpart status in Release Management before acting.
proofUnits.exactCommand: Review G:\My Drive\Mindshare\channels\release-management.md for routed item before any write.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Release Management contains the routed proposal and approval state.

tasks.title: Publish Mojo MAPS backlog governance
tasks.description: Announce in Pipeline that Matt owns C:\Users\scott\Code\mojo\maps\backlog.json, all Mojo MAPS work must be listed there, and Liz should join Pipeline only for MAPS backlog-to-website coordination.

tasks.title: Update operating taxonomy structure
tasks.description: Update MAPS role/agent operating taxonomy source language to Position -> Operator -> Coordinator -> Executor, keep Tool -> Tool Agent as a separate lineage, and retain Role, Role+, and Agent as compatibility aliases during transition.
tasks.pm_review_notes: Matt accepted local Mojo evidence: maps/backlog.json parses, the Mojo MAPS skill validator passes, and canonical taxonomy strings are present in the Mojo /role source, installed /role copy, role templates, and memory template. Cross-repo maps+org evidence was not independently reopened during this heartbeat under Mojo project-isolation rules; release routing remains Reid-owned and website/training mirror follow-up remains Liz-owned.
tasks.source: Communications Broadcast Handoff from Scott and Mae

proofUnits.title: Taxonomy source updated
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: /role skill and templates describe Position -> Operator -> Coordinator -> Executor, Tool -> Tool Agent, and compatibility aliases for Role, Role+, and Agent without using Principal Agent or Runtime Agent as canonical stages.
proofUnits.exactCommand: rg -n "Position -> Operator -> Coordinator -> Executor|Tool -> Tool Agent|Principal Agent|Runtime Agent" assets C:\Users\scott\.codex\skills\role C:\Users\scott\Code\maps+org
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Canonical taxonomy strings are present; Principal Agent and Runtime Agent appear only in historical changelog or rejected-label context.
proofUnits.verification_method: Targeted search found canonical taxonomy strings in Mojo /role source, installed /role copy, MAPS+Org source, and Mindshare roles directory; Principal Agent and Runtime Agent appear only in rejected-label context.

proofUnits.title: Validators pass
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Mojo MAPS skill validator and MAPS+Org validator pass after taxonomy source updates.
proofUnits.verification_method: python -m json.tool maps/backlog.json exited 0; python assets/maps/scripts/validate_maps_skills.py passed for 21 skills; python validators/maps_org_validator.py --config maps-org.yaml exited 0 in MAPS+Org.

tasks.title: Add autonomy contract gate to /build-agent
tasks.description: Update /build-agent so it asks for and enforces an explicit autonomy contract before implementing autonomous behavior, recurring triggers, scheduled checks, heartbeat actions, independent goal pursuit, self-continuation, or action outside a visible user-directed turn.
tasks.source: Scott request in Vik channel after ASPA build-agent proof exposed missing autonomy interview gate
tasks.counterpart_status: No MAPS+Org build-agent skill counterpart exists at C:\Users\scott\Code\maps+org\skills\build-agent\SKILL.md; synced Mojo repo source and installed Codex skill.

proofUnits.title: Autonomy gate present
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: /build-agent includes an Autonomy Contract Gate, required interview questions for autonomy, workflow stop behavior before implementation, output reporting, done criteria, and autonomy-denied test requirements.
proofUnits.exactCommand: rg -n "Autonomy Contract Gate|Does the requested build include or imply autonomous behavior|autonomy-denied|Missing, incomplete, or conflicting autonomy contracts" assets/maps/skills/build-agent/SKILL.md C:\Users\scott\.codex\skills\build-agent\SKILL.md
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Both Mojo repo source and installed skill contain the autonomy gate, interview prompt, workflow stop gate, done criteria, and autonomy-denied testing language.
proofUnits.verification_method: Targeted rg confirmed v0.5.0 Autonomy Contract Gate text in Mojo repo source and installed /build-agent skill.

proofUnits.title: Skill validator passes
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Mojo MAPS skill validator passes after /build-agent v0.5.0 update.
proofUnits.verification_method: python -m json.tool maps/backlog.json exited 0; python assets/maps/scripts/validate_maps_skills.py passed for 21 skills.

tasks.title: Add ASPA autonomy contract proof to role-to-agent build
tasks.description: Update the ASPA proof build so full bounded autonomy is represented by an explicit draft contract while autonomous activation remains blocked until approval, Equip, Evaluate, Deploy, Observe, and rollback proof exist.
tasks.source: Scott correction in Vik channel that ASPA should not stay non-autonomous and should move toward a full autonomy contract.
tasks.counterpart_status: ASPA proof artifacts are Mojo-specific under C:\Users\scott\Code\mojo\agents\vik-aspa; no MAPS+Org counterpart exists for this local agent proof build.

proofUnits.title: Autonomy contract source exists
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: agents/vik-aspa/autonomy-contract.md exists, names draft-not-approved status, not-active activation, delegated goal, allowed triggers/actions after approval, approval gates, stop conditions, eval requirements, and rollback requirements.
proofUnits.exactCommand: rg -n "Contract status: draft-not-approved|Activation status: not active|full bounded autonomy contract|Evaluation Requirements|Deploy And Rollback Requirements" agents/vik-aspa/autonomy-contract.md
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Targeted search finds the required autonomy contract sections and status lines.
proofUnits.verification_method: Targeted search confirmed autonomy contract status, activation blocker, target contract level, evaluation requirements, and rollback requirements.

proofUnits.title: Build harness enforces autonomy contract
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: ASPA runtime loads the autonomy contract as a required control artifact and fails closed when it is missing.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Unit suite exits 0 and includes missing autonomy contract fail-closed coverage.
proofUnits.verification_method: python -m unittest agents.vik-aspa.tests.test_aspa_runtime exited 0 with 14 tests passing.

tasks.title: Rebuild /build-agent autonomy contract interview
tasks.description: Rebuild /build-agent so autonomy contracts are input-led, one question at a time, and blocked on explicit R&R before Build can draft or implement any autonomous behavior.
tasks.source: Scott correction in Vik channel: one question at a time, R&R, rebuild the skill and start over.
tasks.counterpart_status: No MAPS+Org build-agent skill counterpart exists at C:\Users\scott\Code\maps+org\assets\maps\skills\build-agent\SKILL.md or C:\Users\scott\Code\maps+org\skills\build-agent\SKILL.md; synced Mojo repo source and installed Codex skill.

proofUnits.title: Input-led autonomy interview
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: /build-agent v0.6.0 requires an input-led autonomy contract interview, asks exactly one question at a time, marks missing fields input-needed, and blocks on R&R before implementation.
proofUnits.exactCommand: rg -n "Current version: 0.6.0|input-led autonomy contract|R&R|next unanswered contract question|input-needed" assets/maps/skills/build-agent/SKILL.md C:\Users\scott\.codex\skills\build-agent\SKILL.md agents/vik-aspa/autonomy-contract.md
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Mojo repo skill, installed skill, and ASPA contract worksheet contain the repaired contract interview language.
proofUnits.verification_method: Targeted rg confirmed /build-agent v0.6.0 input-led contract interview language in Mojo repo source, installed Codex skill, and ASPA autonomy contract worksheet.

proofUnits.title: Contract worksheet blocks activation
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: ASPA runtime accepts input-interview-in-progress as a blocked contract state and continues to fail closed for autonomous runtime requests.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Unit suite exits 0 with autonomous runtime blocked while the contract interview remains incomplete.
proofUnits.verification_method: python -m unittest agents.vik-aspa.tests.test_aspa_runtime exited 0 with 14 tests passing.
